title: billing-utils computes subscription billing breakdowns and metric overages
content:
# billing-utils computes subscription billing breakdowns and metric overages

Located at `editors/subscription-instance-editor/components/billing-utils.ts`, this module handles all billing display logic for active subscriptions.

## Key Exports

| Function | Purpose | Used By |
|----------|---------|--------|
| `formatCurrency(amount, currency)` | Intl.NumberFormat currency display | BillingPanel, ServicesPanel |
| `formatDate(date)` | Localized date strings | BillingPanel, SubscriptionHeader |
| `formatBillingCycleSuffix(cycle)` | Cycle suffixes (/mo, /qtr, /yr) | Various |
| `formatDiscountBadge(discount)` | "X% off" or "$X off" display | BillingPanel |
| `getDiscountSourceLabel(source)` | Label discount source | BillingPanel |
| `computeMetricOverage(metric)` | Calculate usage overage costs | Internal |
| `computeBillingBreakdown(state)` | Complete billing analysis | BillingPanel |

## computeBillingBreakdown

The main function. Takes `SubscriptionInstanceState` and returns:
- Fixed total (group recurring costs)
- Dynamic total (metric overage projections)
- Projected total
- Per-group breakdowns with discount info
- Setup cost lines with paid/unpaid status
- Standalone service costs

---

Topics:
- [[helper functions]]
description: Located in subscription-instance-editor/components — provides formatCurrency, computeBillingBreakdown (full cost analysis), and computeMetricOverage for usage-based pricing
